title: Vision Zero CIP Authorization
summary: Neil Burke (DPW) presents items 29-30 authorizing the CIP program for Vision Zero work. Schedule A with project details was intended for the packet but may not have been included; Burke commits to sharing immediately. Council requests it be sent to the Law Department for review.
raw_content:
[00:52:14] Uh the items 29 and 30 are to authorize

[00:52:22] work. And this was intended to have a
[00:52:25] schedule A included with it. I'm not
[00:52:27] sure if it made it, but we'll share that

processing_notes: Very brief. Vision Zero CIP details in Schedule A not yet shared with council. Law Department detected from request to send document to law department for review -- not a substantive Law Department involvement.
